stories.title: World Cup's best and most disappointing XIs, from ...
stories.summary: The 2026 World Cup is over, with Spain crowned champions. So let's start handing out some awards starting with the best and the most disappointing players of the tournament.

stories.title: Simultaneously amazing and awful, this World Cup w...
stories.summary: The 2026 World Cup and all that went into it -- the gorgeous and garish, the cinematic and corrupt.

stories.title: Michigan AD Manuel to step down at end of year
stories.summary: Warde Manuel will step down as Michigan AD at the end of the calendar year, the school announced as part of the conclusion of an investigation into the culture of athletics at the university.

stories.title: Source: Italy sound out Guardiola as next coach
stories.summary: Italy have sounded out the possibility of appointing Pep Guardiola as their next coach after missing out on this summer's World Cup, a source told ESPN.

stories.title: Sankey: SEC breakaway talk over college bill real
stories.summary: SEC commissioner Greg Sankey said he continues to have conversations with Congressional leaders about the Protect College Sports Act but stopped short of saying whether all their suggested changes need to be implemented for the conference to support it.
